changes: Remediated dependabot vulnerability in agent-cloud ws dependency
Remediated dependabot vulnerabilities in demo dependencies (ws, js-yaml)
Fixed an issue that could prevent macOS Beta releases from completing
Claude Code setup now detects running CLI sessions and offers a one-click restart to load Omi Memory, and the manual setup cards copy just the paste-able value instead of the labeled text
Fixed Open Omi shortcut changes occasionally reporting a false conflict
Notion is now a live connection: approve Omi once in your browser and it keeps an Omi Memories page fresh in your workspace, replacing the copy-paste export
Obsidian setup now walks you through the steps like the Claude connector does, including what to do when Obsidian asks whether you trust the vault
Onboarding now connects ChatGPT, Claude, Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes over live MCP with the same connect flow as the main app
Beta updates now use the same verified Omi app package as Stable
Omi Beta now stays connected to the same production account, conversations, and memory as the stable macOS app
